name: io.github.BuyWhere/buywhere-mcp
title: BuyWhere MCP
description: Product search, price comparison, and affiliate-ready shopping across Singapore retailers.

environmentVariables.name: BUYWHERE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your BuyWhere API key for authenticated product catalog requests

environmentVariables.name: BUYWHERE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the BuyWhere API base URL (default: https://api.buywhere.ai)

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Authorization header with Bearer token for authenticated API access
